strengthening_paths.suggestion: Add a compact table mapping each active-basis certificate type in B_2 to the exact demanded exposure-cell pattern it separates in the four-unit witness.
For Conjecture 2, precompute and report the exact active-basis witness attaining t_star and the violated J_2 inequality slack, not only the proposed 1/40 lower margin.
Strengthen Conjecture 1 by stating input size and a termination or complexity bound for enumerating W_t and checking B_2; this would add an algorithmic-identifiability axis to the flagship case.

recommended_next_step: Advance to Stage 0 with Conjectures 1-2 as the flagship kernel and keep Conjecture 3 explicitly secondary.
